product_name: Best Roadways — PAN-India Road Freight & Logistics
tagline: India's Most Trusted Freight Partner — since 1985
core_capabilities: Full Truck Load (FTL) — including high-cube containerised vehicles for volumetric cargo
Part Truck Load (PTL) — daily consolidated services (e.g. Nhava Sheva <-> North India corridor)
Warehousing & Distribution — licensed bonded warehouse (75,000 sq ft at Kalamboli, Nhava Sheva)
Chemical & hazmat logistics — PESO-certified tankers and lined containers
CFS & container services at JNPT / Nhava Sheva (own warehouse, weighbridge, truck terminal)
target_audience: Logistics, supply-chain, procurement, plant/operations heads and CXOs at mid-market and enterprise shippers that move physical goods PAN-India — FMCG & consumer goods, chemical & petrochemical, pharmaceutical, automotive & engineering, steel, textiles, solar/energy, and e-commerce. Trigger events: unreliable incumbent transporter, new plant/warehouse, capacity crunch in peak season, hazmat/chemical movement needs, expansion into new regions, or a corridor (esp. Mumbai-Delhi) where consistent FTL/PTL transit matters.
proof_points: 800+ owned vehicles — all GPS-tracked and BS-VI compliant (owned fleet, not brokered)
65+ branches across India, serving 500+ cities with owned hubs and dedicated lanes
National recognition: Transport Ratna (2015) and Transport Samrat (2018) from AIMTC
Own port infrastructure at Nhava Sheva — bonded warehouse, weighbridge, truck terminal
PESO-certified chemical logistics; trusted by major chemical companies in the Gujarat belt
Dominant on the Mumbai-Delhi corridor (self-described largest cargo mover on that lane)

sender.name: TBD — Best Roadways to confirm sender display name
sender.email: TBD — Best Roadways to confirm sending mailbox (must match Brevo verified sender)
sender._note: sender.email MUST be a domain/sender verified in Brevo before any send. Set BREVO_SENDER_NAME / BREVO_SENDER_EMAIL in .env to match.

_notes: Preliminary profile auto-built from https://bestroadways.com/ on 2026-05-29. Best Roadways configures all API keys (Brevo, ERPNext, Gemini) and the leads list themselves. Email frameworks ported from the Bolti playbook; WhatsApp cadence ported from the kstars-sdr model. No Apollo in this tenant — leads come from ERPNext and/or leads.csv.
